test_command: npx vitest run tests/unit/web/pages/BoomGenerate.test.tsx && npx vitest run tests/unit/ && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/tool-boom-generate.spec.ts
notes: Unit: 28/28 pass. Zero-regression: 456/456 pass. Typecheck: exit 0. E2e: 2/2 pass (chromium + mobile). AC-12 browser validation covered by Playwright e2e (same flow). Browse server unavailable in validator context — Playwright is the authoritative browser runner.
